rationale: Ground truth has no substantive concerns (just an 'lgtm' approval), so both candidates correctly land on APPROVE with no fabricated blockers — recall/precision are both strong and roughly tied. Y is slightly more rigorous: it cites specific line numbers for every one of the 9 renamed sites and runs an extra sub-prefix grep sweep for near-misses, making its claims easier to spot-check, while X's verification is described more narratively with a couple of leaked scratch-thought lines at the top. Neither includes a LATENT GAP CHECK section.
